output_payload.liquidation_mechanism_note: Aave v3 fixed 5% liquidation bonus; close factor 50% (up to 100% when HF < 0.95). Any address may trigger liquidation. ETH/USDC main market default thresholds.
output_payload.table_source: Aave v3 Risk Parameters 2024; Morpho Blue vault documentation; Fluid Protocol 2024; Sky (MakerDAO v2) Clipper liquidation; Liquity v2 specification. HF formula: collateral * liq_threshold / debt (Aave-style). Sky/Liquity use collateral-ratio mode. Not live oracle data.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: DeFi lending is unregulated in most jurisdictions. Health factor and liquidation prices are computed from protocol parameters entered by the user; this is not a live risk monitor. Protocol parameters change via governance vote.
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: position amounts and protocol parameters only. No wallet address, ENS name, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_financial_advice: Not financial or investment advice. DeFi lending carries smart contract risk, oracle manipulation risk, and liquidation risk. Verify current parameters with protocol risk dashboards before taking any position.

output_payload.liquidation_mechanism_note: Sky (MakerDAO v2): Clipper Dutch-auction. Price starts at collateral_value * multiplier and decays over time. Liquidation Ratio = minimum collateral/debt ratio. DAI/USDS debt; WETH/stETH collateral typical.
